rationale: Section 44.051 establishes criminal penalties for interfering with Foundation School Program records. It does not address homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal values, so no conflict arises.
quote: An offense under Section 37.10, Penal Code, is a felony of the third degree if it is shown on trial of the offense that the governmental record was a record, form, report, or budget required under Chapter 48 or rules adopted under that chapter.
_note: Rule text is a criminal penalty provision unrelated to homestead exemption valuation; no operative conflict with proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change.
